BrowserPod Recipes

Hello world frameworks that boot inside the browser

Pick a framework recipe, copy its project files into a fresh pod, install dependencies inside BrowserPod, and preview the result through a live portal URL.

Run A Recipe

Fresh pod each time

Each run calls BrowserPod.boot(), so it consumes BrowserPod tokens. Add your key to recipes/.env as VITE_BP_APIKEY=....

Recipe details

Command
Stack

    Portal Preview

    Live app

    Select a recipe and click Run selected recipe to boot a pod.

    Portal URL will appear here.
    The embedded preview stays empty until the inner project listens on a port and BrowserPod creates a portal.

    Terminal

    npm install + dev server logs
